extension.description: Intelligent document converter that transforms Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and PDF files to Markdown with built-in conversion engine
config.title: DocuGenius
config.autoConvert.description: Enable automatic conversion of supported files to Markdown
config.overwriteExisting.description: Overwrite existing .md files if source file is newer
config.extractImages.description: [BETA] Extract images from documents to separate assets folder (experimental feature)
config.imageOutputFolder.description: Folder name for extracted images (relative to document location or markdown subdirectory) (only effective when image extraction is enabled)
config.enableDocumentSplitting.descripti: Automatically split large documents into multiple Markdown files for better performance and readability
config.documentSplittingThreshold.descri: Character count threshold for document splitting (documents exceeding this limit will be split into multiple files)
config.organizeInSubdirectory.descriptio: Organize converted Markdown files in a subdirectory to separate them from source files
config.markdownSubdirectoryName.descript: Name of the subdirectory where converted Markdown files will be stored
config.showSuccessNotifications.descript: Show popup notifications when files are successfully converted
config.createProjectConfig.description: Create .docugenius.json project configuration file by default (if disabled, uses global settings only)
config.copyTextFiles.description: Copy plain text files (.txt, .md, .csv, etc.) to the knowledge base folder for unified indexing
config.batchConversionBehavior.descripti: How to handle multiple files detected at once
config.batchConversionBehavior.askForEac: Ask for confirmation for each file individually
config.batchConversionBehavior.askOnce: Ask once for all files in the batch
config.batchConversionBehavior.convertAl: Automatically convert all files without asking
config.batchDetectionWindow.description: Time window (in milliseconds) to detect batch file operations
command.convertFile.title: [DocuGenius]Convert to Markdown
command.convertFolder.title: [DocuGenius]Process All Files in Folder
command.enableProject.title: [DocuGenius]Enable for Current Project
command.disableProject.title: [DocuGenius]Disable for Current Project
command.showProjectStatus.title: [DocuGenius]Show Project Status
command.installRuntime.title: [DocuGenius]Install Shared Runtime
command.repairRuntime.title: [DocuGenius]Repair Shared Runtime
command.showRuntimeStatus.title: [DocuGenius]Show Runtime Status
log.batchComplete: Batch conversion complete: {0} files converted successfully
log.runtime.bootstrap: Preparing shared runtime with bootstrap Python: {0}
runtime.prompt.manualTitle: DocuGenius needs a shared local runtime before it can convert documents on Windows.
runtime.prompt.backgroundTitle: DocuGenius found documents to convert, but the shared runtime is not ready yet.
runtime.progress.creatingEnvironment: Creating an isolated shared Python environment...
runtime.progress.installingDependencies: Installing required conversion packages into the shared runtime...
runtime.error.installFailed: DocuGenius could not prepare the shared runtime. Open the logs to see the full setup output.
runtime.error.pythonMissing: DocuGenius could not find Python 3.6+ on this machine. Install Python once to bootstrap the shared runtime.
runtime.error.setupDeferred: DocuGenius skipped conversion because the shared runtime is not ready yet.
runtime.error.verifyFailed: The shared runtime was created, but dependency verification failed.
runtime.error.invalidRuntimePath: Refusing to modify a runtime path outside the extension storage directory.
runtime.error.timeout: Command timed out after {0} seconds while preparing the shared runtime.
runtime.detail.ready: The shared runtime is installed and verified.
runtime.detail.installRequired: The shared runtime has not been installed yet. DocuGenius will create one copy for this extension and reuse it across workspaces.
runtime.detail.repairRequired: The shared runtime exists, but it is missing files or dependencies and needs repair.
runtime.detail.missingPython: Python is required once to bootstrap the shared runtime. DocuGenius will not install dependencies into each workspace.
runtime.status.notManagedPlatform: This platform uses the built-in bundled converter and does not need a managed Python runtime.
